description:
A non-existent [[Object]]. To compare non-existent objects use [[isNull]] or [[isEqualTo]]:
<sqf>
objNull == objNull;			// false
isNull objNull;				// true
objNull isEqualTo objNull;	// true
</sqf>
examples: <sqf>player == player; // false if player is null</sqf>
<sqf>isNull player; // true if player is null</sqf>
name: objNull
